description_long: This is a pair of large, round, intricately beaded earrings displayed on a white bust stand. Each earring features a circular design with a central yellow and red floral motif, surrounded by concentric rings of smaller beads in yellow, red, and black. The outer edge of each earring is adorned with a delicate, lace-like fringe of beads, giving the jewelry a bold and ornate appearance. The earrings are attached to gold-colored hooks, which are visible from the side views. The beadwork is dense and symmetrical, suggesting a handcrafted, artisanal quality. The overall style is vibrant and eye-catching, suitable for festive or traditional occasions.
description: A pair of large, round, beaded earrings with intricate floral and lace-like patterns in yellow, red, and black, displayed on a white bust stand. The earrings are ornate and feature gold-colored hooks.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earrings' full circular beaded patterns and intricate floral motifs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the earrings and the gold-colored hooks protruding from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bust stand, with the earrings mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the gold-colored hooks and the edge of the earrings visible.
